name: Revolver
description: The Revolver is an early-game Jakobs handgun best known for being guaranteed from Knuckle Dragger on the first kill. Like other Jakobs pistols, it fires as fast as you can pull the trigger and leans on raw mechanical feel rather than special effects. Its exact performance depends on the barrel, with Bandit or Scav versions pushing damage, Dahl versions improving control, and Maliwan versions slightly tightening accuracy.
notes: It can also appear from any suitable loot source. Blue-rarity versions are called the Wheelgun and use the same part pool. The gun cannot roll an element, but a Maliwan barrel still increases elemental status-effect damage bonuses.
